name: io.github.yedanyagamiai-cmd/openclaw-mcp-servers
description: 9 remote MCP servers on Cloudflare Workers for AI agents. Free tier + Pro API keys.
title: OpenClaw MCP Ecosystem

remotes.description: Format, validate, diff, query (JSONPath), transform, and auto-generate JSON Schema. 6 tools, free tier available.
Test, explain, build from natural language, replace, and extract with regular expressions. 25+ built-in patterns. 5 tools.
Generate color palettes, check WCAG contrast, convert formats (Hex/RGB/HSL), create CSS gradients, look up Tailwind colors. 5 tools.
Convert Unix/ISO timestamps, timezone math, cron parsing, time differences, duration formatting. 5 tools.
Score, optimize, and convert AI prompts. Generate system prompts. 30+ production templates (Pro). 6 tools.
AI agent market intelligence — GitHub trends, market reports, ecosystem statistics, competitive analysis. 6 tools.
Daily zodiac horoscopes, tarot card readings, lucky numbers, zodiac rankings for all 12 signs. 3 tools.
Japanese content publishing — MD to HTML, SEO, EN-JP translation, article outlines for note.com/Zenn/Qiita. 8 tools.
Compare AI coding tools side-by-side — Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Devin, and more. Profiles, pricing, recommendations. 5 tools.
